summary: Weekly newsletter edition captured for 23 July 2026.
provenance: Generated from the current working tree.

headlines.title: Gedatolisib + Fulvestrant
headlines.summary: FDA approved gedatolisib with fulvestrant, with or without palbociclib, for PIK3CA-wild-type HR-positive/HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer after endocrine progression, adding a large progression-free-survival gain in a setting where many patients have already exhausted first-line endocrine options.

headlines.title: Galleri-NHS negative screening signal
headlines.summary: This is a major cautionary signal for population blood-based multi-cancer screening. A negative primary endpoint should slow premature adoption and reshape how MCED claims are presented to payers and the public.

spotlight.title: Gedatolisib + Fulvestrant
spotlight.subtitle: Phase III · US approved; India launch unverified
